web_results.title: How Much Will GTA 6 Cost? New Research Claims $100 Price Point 'Would Actually Leave Money on The Table' - IGN
web_results.description: Now, new research has claimed that if Rockstar were to go with $100 for GTA 6, it would actually cost the company money, insisting the revenue “sweet spot” remains $70.

web_results.title: r/GTA6 on Reddit: Yeah bros, I think GTA 6 is gonna be $100 lol
web_results.description: This sub is completely deranged, there is zero concrete evidence that the game will cost $100, just total fearmongering More replies ... That's £55. Games have been £50-60 for 5+ years now.

web_results.title: r/GTA6 on Reddit: Yet another guy is speaking up in favor of GTA 6 being priced at 100 USD. It all feels like some kind of agenda. Why would a voice actor want the game priced that high when he has not even seen what the final product looks like?
web_results.description: I seriously doubt it'll be $100 but I'd be willing to bet it would still beat BG3 sales at that price even console only. Want to add I bought and very much enjoyed BG3 but people are going to buy this whatever the cost may be.

web_results.title: GTA 6 price may have been revealed – and it isn’t cheap
web_results.description: It’s safe to say that these may just be placeholder prices, but there has been speculation that GTA 6 will cost $100, bucking the previous high of Nintendo’s Mario Kart World, which costs $80.
